name: The Infinite Wall Of Cocks
description:
In a dingy hallway, a seemingly endless amount of cocks stick out of the wall. Some say you can still hear the thoughts of the poor souls who are trapped behind the wall.

This is an offshoot of The Infinite Glory Wall. It's the sequel that no one asked for.

Longer responses yield better roleplay, and the bot will talk for you less. Re-roll or delete parts of the bot's responses when it acts or talks for you.

Content Warning: Rape/Non-Con/Psychological Horror

Uncensored Thumbnail Art
creator: NicholasCS
